description.value: The creature is thick-set and difficult to move. It is treated as if its size were one step larger for the purposes of the Knock Down action and resisting Grapple attempts. Enemies attempting to Knock Down or Grapple a Sturdy creature suffer a –10 penalty.

system.benefit: Treated as one size larger for Knock Down and Grapple resistance. Enemies suffer –10 to Knock Down or Grapple this creature.
